CustomField.description: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.formula:
IF( Quick_Close__c =True, "",
IF( AND( IsClosed = False , fxStageNumber__c <=4
, OR ( CloseDate < Today()-31 , CloseDate > Today()+3650 ) ) ,'•Verify Close Date;' ,"" )) /* & IF( Territory2Id ="","•Territory;","") */
CustomField.inlineHelpText: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.label: fxMissingFields_stage4
